name: David S.
title: Casa Larga Vineyards, Fairport, NY
text: We at Casa Larga Vineyards in Fairport, NY have been using Highland Media's services for years. They are professional, reliable, and consistently deliver outstanding results.

name: Kim Chizuk
text: This is my second time working with Mike at Highland Media for a large group event for work and I can't say enough good things! He's responsive, organized, reliable, and exceptional at what he does! A Plus and I'll be back to hire you again next year!

name: Tony Brown
title: RAOM Performance Hall
text: Highland Media did a fantastic job with audio engineering for our show at the RAOM Performance Hall. Highly recommend their services.

name: Carl Johengen
title: Asbury First United Methodist
text: Asbury First United Methodist has been renting from Highland Media Services for several years for special occasions. Always professional and reliable.

name: Diana Lauria
title: Junior Achievement Discovery Center
text: Mike Besaw was great helping us set up audio for the Junior Achievement Discovery Center Ribbon Cutting Event. We plan to use him again.
